text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home after a day out with Nishino
Flower...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah! Trainer, look over there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow her line of sight and spot a little boy
crouched down by the riverbank.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Is he alone? It's going to be dark soon.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer. Can I go see if he's okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...I see. So you broke your mother's favorite cup.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh... I know she's gonna be really, really mad at me... so... so I... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. You got scared and left home without
telling anyone, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Here, watch this. I'll show you something cool.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea where she was hiding them, but
Nishino Flower pulls out some small beanbags and
tosses them up in the air.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then she catches them gracefully and quickly
tosses them up again in tall, beautiful arcs...

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: W-wow! Are you a circus performer?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower moves around vigorously, spinning
and hopping to and fro, all while keeping the
beanbags dancing in the air.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text:
That was amazing! You must be some kind of pro
juggler!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪ It's nice to see you smiling. Now then...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready to go home to your mom? If you're
still scared, we can tag along and apologize with
you. I'm sure she's worried sick about you.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're about to accompany the boy back to his
house when...
There you are!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: M-mom!

text_block_list.name: Boy's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad you're safe!
I'm terribly sorry for the trouble my son has
caused!
choice_data_list: We're just glad you're together again.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Don't you have something to say to your mom?

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Mom... I'm really sorry... but I broke your cup.

text_block_list.name: Boy's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You silly boy! You're far more important to me
than some old cup! Oh, I've been beside myself
with worry!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Sob... Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We see them off before once again heading back
to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for coming with me to help that boy,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm glad they were able to make up.
choice_data_list: You were so mature and reliable back there.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I-I don't know about that... All I did was talk to
him like I would with anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm happy to know that's how you saw me,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's tender side leaves a lasting
impression on me as we continue following the
path home.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm pretty confident in my skills, actually.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
When I was younger, my mom used to cheer me
up by juggling whenever I cried.
choice_data_list: So you used the trick your mom taught you.
So you used the trick your mom taught you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! The last time I showed her my juggling, she
was really stunned by how good I'd gotten.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's hidden talent leaves a lasting
impression on me as we continue following the
path home.
